nav.upgradeBody: Unlock meal plans, grocery lists and advanced insights.

hero.subtitle: Snap your plate. The AI analyzes, scores, and suggests. The shortest loop between knowing and eating well.

dashboardPreview.nextBiteText: Add blueberries to your next snack — antioxidants are running low today.

howItWorks.title: From photo to insight in four steps.

step1.title: Snap a photo
step1.desc: Take a picture of your plate. The AI identifies every food and estimates portions in seconds.

step2.title: Get your score
step2.desc: Fiber, blood-sugar impact, and overall nutrition — scored from 0 to 100.

step3.title: 24/7 AI Nutritionist
step3.desc: Personalized nudges based on your goals, lab work, and habits.

step4.title: Grocery list
step4.desc: Your plan turns into a shopping list — sent to Instacart or your delivery app in one tap.

protocols.title: Personalized nutrition for every stage of life.

p1.title: Smart hormonal nutrition
p1.desc: Support hormonal balance with phytoestrogen-rich plants, magnesium, and omegas.

p2.title: Postpartum recovery
p2.desc: Protein, iron, and nutrient-dense foods like eggs and liver for recovery and breastfeeding.

p3.title: Eat to age well
p3.desc: Insulin sensitivity, gut microbiome, and strong bones — all tracked.

p4.title: Performance without meat
p4.desc: Complete protein, creatine, and B12 for athletes who train animal-free.

t1.quote: I stopped counting calories by hand. I snap, see the score, adjust. That simple.
t1.name: Marina K.

t2.quote: I finally figured out what was wrecking my sleep. It was my afternoon coffee spiking my blood sugar.
t2.name: André S.

t3.quote: I use it with my patients. Adherence is up 3x because they see the impact in real time.
t3.name: Dr. Laura P.

plans.subtitle: Sign up free. Pay only when the app earns it.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.q1: How does the AI analyze my meal?
faqs.a1: You snap a photo of your plate. Our AI identifies each food, estimates portions using visual references, and calculates macros, fiber, blood-sugar impact, and a nutrition score — all in under 3 seconds.
faqs.q2: Do I need any special equipment?
faqs.a2: No. Just your phone's camera. Salus works on any iOS or Android smartphone.
faqs.a3: Yes. Your data is encrypted and never sold. You can export or delete everything at any time.
faqs.a4: Yes. Cancel online whenever you want — no hassle, no fees.
faqs.q5: Does Salus work with specific diets?
faqs.a5: Yes. During onboarding you set your goals and restrictions — gluten-free, vegan, low-carb, keto — and the AI adapts every analysis and recommendation.

bottomCta.title: Start eating smarter today.
bottomCta.subtitle: Create your account in 30 seconds. No credit card.
bottomCta.billing: Subscriptions billed through Apple ID and Google Play.

footer.disclaimer: Salus uses AI for nutritional analysis. Estimates and recommendations are educational approximations and do not replace medical, nutritional, or professional diagnostic advice. Consult a healthcare professional before making significant changes to your diet.
